title: Prestige Estates Capital India is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Senior)

jsonLd.title: Prestige Estates Capital India is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
Prestige Estates Capital India is actively seeking a talented and motivated Senior Property Advisor to join our dynamic team in Rajkot. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Prestige Estates Capital India:
Prestige Estates Capital India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in MS Office

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Professional development and training programs
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Rajkot, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Prestige Estates Capital India!
